News.Title: Multiple App Launcher: release on Linux
News.Content: We made the decision to release our Multiple App Launcher application on Linux as well making it cross-platform. The release is expected to be before June of 2026.

News.Title: BREAKING NEWS: We moved from the old 'ferlaty.netlify.app' domain to the 'ferlaty.pages.dev'
News.Content: We moved from Netlify to Cloudflare because of the pricing at Netlify. The old subdomain of 'ferlaty.netlify.app' has automatic redirect to the new (ferlaty.pages.dev) one.

News.Title: New release of the Multiple App Launcher (1.3.0)
News.Content: Today we released version 1.3.0 of the Multiple App Launcher. Key highlights: new app limit of 10; console prints current time of the day; fully open source.

News.Title: BREAKING NEWS: Open sourcing the 'Multiple App Launcher' project
News.Content: To increase the trust, visibility and customisation, we are open sourcing the 'Multiple App Launcher' project. So from today, 28th of March, 2026 the source code is hosted on GitHub under the Apache License.

News.Title: A big re-deesign of the Ferlaty website
News.Content: To increase the average sessiont time we made a big re-design of our website which involves every single page on our website. We moved from the previous, light theme design to our new, dark one. We also added a bunch of photos to be a better experience visiting the website. We also added sections, animations and a brand new footeer.

News.Title: Launch of the new 'News' page on the Ferlaty website
News.Content: We just started our news page today, here you can read about the upcoming news about our projects and the brand itself, Ferlaty. We hope that you will like it :D.
